overall.description: First-person exploration of Oracle Park baseball stadium in a video game, walking the warning track around the outfield with views of the stands, iconic Coca-Cola bottle, giant baseball glove sculpture, and main scoreboard under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: baseball field warning track near tunnel exit

events.description: exits dark tunnel entrance onto the sunlit baseball field

agents.ego_description: walking out of the tunnel onto the field and beginning to explore the empty stadium

entered.detail: rows of green stadium seats curving around the field in a large bowl
red dirt warning track along the edge of the grass field
green grass of the baseball outfield
large structural arch with rectangular openings above the upper deck

segments.scene_description: The video begins with a first-person view exiting a dark tunnel onto the bright field at Oracle Park. The camera walks onto the warning track with green grass to the left and rows of empty green stadium seats curving around to the right, all under a clear blue midday sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: outfield warning track along right field line

events.description: camera pans upward to look at the upper deck architecture and sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the warning track toward left field while looking around the stadium architecture

entered.detail: giant Coca-Cola bottle sculpture in left field
large baseball glove sculpture adjacent to the bottle

segments.scene_description: Walking along the red warning track, the camera approaches the iconic Coca-Cola bottle and baseball glove sculptures in left field. The stadium seats remain visible to the right while the camera occasionally pans up to view the upper deck structure against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: left field corner with scoreboard and sculptures

events.description: approaching the giant Coca-Cola bottle and baseball glove sculptures
camera tilts upward to view the top of the main scoreboard structure

agents.ego_description: walking past the outfield sculptures and approaching the main scoreboard while looking up at its height

entered.detail: massive scoreboard with advertisements for Adobe, PlayStation, Coors Light, Honda, and Visa

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the Coca-Cola bottle and glove sculptures, bringing the massive main scoreboard into full view. The scoreboard displays multiple brand advertisements on its facade. The camera approaches the scoreboard and tilts upward to take in its full height against the bright sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: left field to center field transition

events.description: passing the main scoreboard and returning to open outfield view

agents.ego_description: continuing around the outfield past the scoreboard and heading back toward center field

entered.detail: padded outfield wall with Visa branding visible

segments.scene_description: Passing the scoreboard, the camera continues along the outfield wall featuring Visa advertisements, then curves back toward center field. The view opens up again to show the expansive grass field and the stadium seating bowl on the left as the tour continues around the empty ballpark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the dim confines of a tunnel into the expansive, sun-drenched outfield of Oracle Park. It begins by emerging from the darkness onto the bright red warning track, where the view opens to reveal lush green grass on the left and curving rows of empty green seats under a clear midday sky. As the camera advances along the track, the perspective shifts toward the iconic Coca-Cola bottle and giant baseball glove sculptures in left field, occasionally panning upward to capture the stadium's upper deck. The scene then expands as the camera passes these landmarks to bring the massive, advertisement-clad main scoreboard into full view, tilting upward to emphasize its height against the bright sun. Finally, the movement continues past the Visa-branded outfield wall and curves back toward center field, reopening the vista to the wide grass expanse and the surrounding seating bowl.
